creator: arrowd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 251633
native implementation patch

I don't think we should piggy back on linprocfs.

Here is my take on implementation that uses native procfs. With this patch we were able to join our AD domain at $WORK.

I was planning to submit it after https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/pull/272 lands.

Sponsored by: Serenity Cybersecurity, LLC
